zh.lifeSummary: 當Caleb Curtice於1646年9月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆時，他的父親Richard Curtice20歲，母親Sarah Carwithy20歲。他於1670年12月1日與Elizabeth Ryder在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1730年3月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德享年83歲，埋葬在美國紐約州素福爾可素爾德素爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Caleb Curtice于1646年9月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆时，他的父亲Richard Curtice20岁，母亲Sarah Carwithy20岁。他于1670年12月1日与Elizabeth Ryder在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1730年3月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德享年83岁，埋葬在美国纽约州素福爾可素爾德素爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Curtice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of North German   Gerdes  .

variants.name: Curtis
meanings: English: nickname for a refined person, sometimes perhaps given ironically, from Middle English, Old French courteis, courtois, curtis ‘courtly, refined, urbane’ (derivative of Old French court; see Court 1).

nameMeanings.name: Caleb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by an early Israelite, one of only two of those who set out with Moses from Egypt to live long enough to enter the promised land (Numbers 26:65). The name, which is apparently derived from the word for ‘dog’ in Hebrew, is said in some traditions to symbolize devotion to God. It was popular among the Puritans and was introduced by them to America. In recent years it has become quite popular both in the United States and Britain.

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683:Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Suffolk, New York, United States

historicEvents.title: Salem Witch Trials
historicEvents.description: In 1692, the Salem Witch Trials began when Betty Parris fell sick with an unknown illness. Her cousin Abigail William claimed that she was being made sick because of witchcraft. As other strange events began to happen more of the young ladies in the town started accussing more people. These people mainly consisted of people the young ladies did not like. By the time the hysteria ended over 200 people were accussed of being witches. Nineteen men and women were found guilty and hung.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Biography- Remembering the Victims of the Salem Witch Executions

historicEvents.title: Crowninshield-Bentley House Built
historicEvents.description: The Crowninshield-Bentley house was built in 1727 by ship captain John Caspar Crowninshield. His family occupied the house for generations until it was taken over by Revend Bentley.

en.lifeSummary: When Caleb Curtice was born on 24 September 1646, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Richard Curtice, was 20 and his mother, Sarah Carwithy, was 20. He married Elizabeth Ryder on 1 December 1670, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 March 1730, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Southold, Southold, Suffolk, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Caleb Curtice est né le 24 septembre 1646, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Curtice, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Carwithy, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ryder le 1 décembre 1670, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1730, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Southold, Southold, Suffolk, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Caleb Curtice am 24. September 1646 in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Curtice 20 und seine Mutter Sarah Carwithy 20. Er hat am 1. Dezember 1670 in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Ryder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1730 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Southold, Southold, Suffolk, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Caleb Curtice è nato il il 24 settembre 1646 nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Richard Curtice, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Carwithy, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Ryder il 1 dicembre 1670, nel Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1730, nel Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Southold, Southold, Suffolk, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Caleb Curticeが1646年9月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムで生まれた時，父Richard Curticeは20歳，母Sarah Carwithyは20歳であった。1670年12月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドでElizabeth Ryderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1730年3月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドで83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクソウソルドソウソルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Southold, Suffolk, Long Island, New York: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 소우토드 소우토드
ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.lifeSummary: Caleb Curtice(이)가 1646년 9월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Curtice(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Carwithy(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1670년 12월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 Elizabeth Ryder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1730년 3월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 소우토드 소우토드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Caleb Curtice nasceu em 24 de setembro de 1646, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Curtice, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Carwithy, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ryder em 1 de dezembro de 1670, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1730, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Southold, Southold, Suffolk, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Caleb Curtice родился 24 сентября 1646 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard Curtice было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Carwithy, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ryder 1 декабря 1670 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 марта 1730 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности соутолд, соутолд, суффолк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Caleb Curtice nació el 24 de septiembre de 1646, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Curtice, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sarah Carwithy, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Ryder el 1 de diciembre de 1670, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1730, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Southold, Southold, Suffolk, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
